# Decomposed Reward Signals (CONCEPT:AHE-3.10)

## Overview
Separates step-level reward (local constraint satisfaction) from trajectory-level reward (goal achievement) for accurate credit assignment. Feeds into ExperienceNode distillation (CONCEPT:AHE-3.10).

## Implementation Details
- **Source Code**: ``agent_utilities/graph/reward_decomposition.py``
- **Pillar**: AHE
